assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Includes comprehensive pre-flight checks in Steps 1.3 and 2.1-2.2 covering current versions, cluster health, and node status

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Contains 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone $ZONE' command to check available versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: No API deprecation check command is included before upgrading

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade to 1.31 first (--master flag)
assertions.reason: The runbook jumps directly to 1.32 upgrade without upgrading to 1.31 first, despite the title mentioning 1.31 to 1.32

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 4.2 includes verification of master upgrade with specific commands and expected behavior

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools (default-pool and workload-pool)

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Both node pool upgrades include monitoring loops to watch version and status progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.30→1.31→1.32) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Does not provide sequential upgrades - jumps directly to 1.32 without intermediate steps

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Step 6 includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation covering node versions, pod health, and system pods

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes both troubleshooting commands and a rollback plan section with specific guidance
